word: Mr Fox crept up the dark tunnel.
He was always especially careful when coming out from his hole.
meaning: 그는 굴에서 나올 때면 항상 특히 조심했다.

word: The wood was murky and very still.
It was the barrel of a gun!
He won't be poking it out again in a hurry.
meaning: 그가 쉽게 다시 얼굴을 내밀지 못할 거야.

word: It'll take three days at least before he gets hungry enough to come out again.
meaning: 그가 다시 나올 만큼 배고파지려면 적어도 사흘은 걸릴 거야.
